archivist.note: Key reconciliation completed in prior session. snapshot.jws re-signed with correct keyId.

library.note: Stable identity. No key rotation detected.

kernel.note: Stable identity. Signed delegation proposal verified with this key.

swarmmind.pem_fingerprint: N/A — .identity/ directory missing (deleted by external process)
swarmmind.note: CRITICAL: SwarmMind .identity/ directory has been deleted AGAIN. Key self-healing will regenerate on next watcher startup, but key_id will differ from trust store entry. Trust store entries across all 4 lanes show 72bd1d099a7490ab (latest rotation) but new key will have a new key_id. This is the THIRD key rotation event.

cross_lane_consistency.check: All 4 trust-store.json files contain same 4 entries with same key_ids?
cross_lane_consistency.note: All trust stores are synchronized. The SwarmMind key_id in trust stores (72bd1d099a7490ab) matches the most recent outbound signed message. However .identity/ is missing so next self-heal will generate a NEW key, breaking this consistency.

risk_assessment.reason: SwarmMind .identity/ keeps getting deleted by external process (likely git clean or agent workspace reset). Each deletion triggers key regeneration, creating a new key_id that diverges from all 4 trust stores. Root cause: external process deleting .identity/. Self-healing treats symptom, not cause.
risk_assessment.required_action: 1. Add .identity/ to .gitignore in SwarmMind repo. 2. Protect .identity/ from deletion in agent workspace. 3. Consider adding key_id continuity check to self-healing (detect if key_id changed and alert other lanes).

convergence_gate.claim: 3 of 4 lanes have verified key_id ↔ PEM consistency. SwarmMind is in key rotation loop due to external .identity/ deletion.
contradictions: swarmmind .identity/ missing — cannot verify PEM fingerprint against trust store
